steps.title: Restrict to red maples
steps.content: The condition says the tree is a red maple, so use only the red maple row of the table.

steps.title: Use the row counts
steps.content: There are $35$ red maples from Site A and $50$ red maples total. The conditional probability is $$\frac{35}{50}=\frac{7}{10}=0.7$$
